title: Skills
subtitle: Browse and manage AI capabilities
gatewayWarning: Gateway is not running. Skills cannot be loaded without an active Gateway.

detail.author: Author
detail.apiKeyDesc: The primary API key for this skill. Leave blank if not required or configured elsewhere.
detail.envNote: Note: Rows with empty keys will be automatically removed during save.

toast.failedFolderNotFound: Skills folder does not exist yet. Install a skill first.
toast.failedOpenActualFolder: Failed to open actual skill folder
toast.searchTimeoutError: Search timed out, check network. You can also search on clawd.org.cn, download the ZIP, and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.installTimeoutError: Installation timed out, check network. You can also download the ZIP from clawd.org.cn and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.searchRateLimitError: Search rate limit exceeded. You can also search on clawd.org.cn, download the ZIP, and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.installRateLimitError: Installation rate limit exceeded. You can also download the ZIP from clawd.org.cn and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.searchUnavailableError: The skill marketplace is temporarily unavailable. Check the network, then search again. You can also download a ZIP from clawd.org.cn and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.installUnavailableError: This skill cannot be installed right now. Check the network and try again, or download a ZIP from clawd.org.cn and extract it to "{{path}}"
toast.fetchUnavailableError: The skill list is temporarily unavailable, please try again later.
toast.timeoutError: Request timed out, please check the network and try again.
toast.rateLimitError: Too many requests, please try again later.
toast.fetchTimeoutError: Fetching skills timed out, please check your network connection.
toast.fetchRateLimitError: Fetching skills rate limit exceeded, please try again later.
toast.noBatchEnableTargets: All visible skills are already enabled.
toast.noBatchDisableTargets: All visible skills are already disabled.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.installDialogSubtitle: Enter a keyword to search the clawd.org.cn skill marketplace.
marketplace.securityNote: Click skill card to view its documentation and security information on clawd.org.cn before installation.
marketplace.manualInstallHint: Network issues? You can always download skill ZIP archives from clawd.org.cn and extract them manually into "{{path}}".
marketplace.noResults: No skills found matching your search.
marketplace.emptyPrompt: Enter a keyword to search the skill marketplace.
marketplace.searchError: clawd.org.cn search failed. Check your connection or installation.
